title: Ensure Versioning is Enabled for Object Storage Buckets

input_row.title: Ensure Versioning is Enabled for Object Storage Buckets
input_row.description: A bucket is a logical container for storing objects. Object versioning is enabled at the bucket level and is disabled by default upon creation. Versioning directs Object Storage to automatically create an object version each time a new object is uploaded, an existing object is overwritten, or when an object is deleted. You can enable object versioning at bucket creation time or later.
input_row.rationale: Versioning object storage buckets provides for additional integrity of your data. Management of data integrity is critical to protecting and accessing protected data. Some customers want to identify object storage buckets without versioning in order to apply their own data lifecycle protection and management policy.
input_row.audit: From Console: 1. Login to OCI Console. 2. Select Storage from the Services menu. 3. Select Buckets from under the Object Storage & Archive Storage section. 4. Click on an individual bucket under the Name heading. 5. Ensure that the Object Versioning is set to Enabled. 6. Repeat for each compartment From CLI: 1. Execute the following command: for region in $(oci iam region-subscription list --all | jq -r '.data[] | ."region-name"') do echo "Enumerating region $region" for compid in $(oci iam compartment list --include-root --compartment-id- in-subtree TRUE 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.data[] | .id') do echo "Enumerating compartment $compid" for bkt in $(oci os bucket list --compartment-id $compid --region $region 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.data[] | .name') do output=$(oci os bucket get --bucket-name $bkt --region $region 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.data | select(."versioning" == "Disabled").name') if [ ! -z "$output" ]; then echo $output; fi done done done 2. Ensure no results are returned.
input_row.remediation: From Console: 1. Follow the audit procedure above. 2. For each bucket in the returned results, click the Bucket Display Name 3. Click Edit next to Object Versioning: Disabled 4. Click Enable Versioning From CLI: 1. Follow the audit procedure 2. For each of the buckets identified, execute the following command: oci os bucket update --bucket-name --versioning Enabled
input_row.references: 1. https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/usingversioning.htm 2. https://docs.oracle.com/en- us/iaas/api/#/en/objectstorage/20160918/Bucket/GetBucket 5.2 Block Volumes This section contains recommendations for configuring block volume related options.
input_row.justification: The control requires checking if versioning is enabled on object storage buckets, which can be automated using AWS APIs. The AWS CLI command `aws s3api get-bucket-versioning` and the boto3 method `s3.get_bucket_versioning()` allow for programmatic verification of the versioning status on S3 buckets. This aligns with the second AI's suggestion and is feasible with AWS's capabilities.
input_row.automation_summary: - AWS Resource/Service: S3 Buckets - API/CLI Method: `aws s3api get-bucket-versioning`, `boto3.client('s3').get_bucket_versioning()` - Properties to Check: `Status` field in the response - Pass Criteria: `Status` is `Enabled` - Fail Criteria: `Status` is `Suspended` or not present

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** oci_objectstorage_bucket_versioning_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Enumerate all compartments using the OCI CLI command:  
  `oci iam compartment list --include-root --compartment-id-in-subtree TRUE`
- For each region retrieved via:  
  `oci iam region-subscription list`
- For each compartment and region, enumerate all object storage buckets with:  
  `oci os bucket list --compartment-id <compartment_id> --region <region>`
- For each bucket, fetch its configuration:  
  `oci os bucket get --bucket-name <bucket_name> --region <region>`
- Inspect the `"versioning"` property in the response JSON (`.data.versioning`).  
- **Pass Criteria:** The `"versioning"` property is set to `"Enabled"` for every bucket.
- **Fail Criteria:** Any bucket with `"versioning"` set to `"Disabled"` or missing/incorrect value.
- This check is feasible and comprehensive via the OCI CLI and SDK as shown in the audit and remediation steps, and also confirmed by the referenced documentation:  
  [OCI: Using Object Versioning](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/usingversioning.htm)  
  [GetBucket API Reference](https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/api/#/en/objectstorage/20160918/Bucket/GetBucket)
- The automated procedure ensures organization-wide coverage across all compartments and regions for every object storage bucket.

**SOURCE:** CIS_Oracle_Cloud_Infrastructure_Foundations_Benchmark_v3_0_0
